rationale: Build on the current best soft quant-aware ramp by refining the closest valid miss: row-offset center choice. Instead of committing an entire tensor to row-mean centering, this version keeps the same artifact format and offset gate but chooses the best center per row among mean, midpoint, mid-mean, and zero fallback. That targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact directly, reuses the existing row-offset metadata budget, and avoids hot-loop cost because the extra work only happens during quantization-aware snaps and final serialization.
title: Row-Wise Multi-Center Offset Int8
